textByHash.01160cc7de2dadc8a6fa57a6ed47c816bafeedd1: He'd had so much to drink. He fell harder than expected, and he wouldn't get up... I fled... I never wanted him to...
textByHash.067b04db7544ffb4beb98a01ad068b7ccd3b5392: I've overcome so much! I won't fall at this last hurdle!
textByHash.100f39d5b79ec99a328fd71639f21c38294fb9cf: At last, the vile villain shows themselves!
textByHash.3788dcef7f30eb0b13e99ccd84c88a1153b3ee6d: How could you be this powerful?
textByHash.74ab5870c6c5c84f8236627321f11e8eafdcddef: You don't understand... I never poisoned him... I just tripped him. All I wanted was to put him out of action. A small injury would've been enough for him to not perform this evening...
textByHash.7f77f3ae0197a3fe1bd2c674641d6b8993146545: Argh! You're stronger than I thought... I need to regroup!
textByHash.8f4b545e19e12e02ff7a008b979ecd7d82faa7ad: I can't keep up with this!
textByHash.99c41ee4965cc938769a017ffc99bf81b11e1a48: Ha! You've stepped into my trap.
textByHash.a080f4d77e84a3f0fa6617c66480d7144dbf6568: I've been stuck in the shadow of that man for too long. He wouldn't even let me fill another role...
textByHash.c6a7bc32a6c6d0d44e38516ca43e32b89e3c7b48: And so I take my leave from this mortal coil!
textByHash.e2c641c16876aedf89725cbef0162a8b210772b8: I must make my last stand... Could you find it in your heart to stay your hand?
textByHash.e6034eba6f9124aec323a5635017440dc5dbc635: I am no murderer! What vexatious allegations you come at me with!
